name: Naati Pinky Ki Lambi Love Story
original_name: Naati Pinky Ki Lambi Love Story
overview: Naati Pinky Ki Lambi Love Story is an Indian television drama series which premiered on 27 January 2020 on Colors TV. Produced by Cockrow Entertainment and Shaika Films, it stars Riya Shukla and Puneett Chouksey.
